title: Toilet Brush, Stainless Steel Silicone Toilet Brush and Holder Flexible Soft Silicone Toilet Brush for Deep Cleaning with Long Handle Wall Mounted Silver
features: 【Premium Silicone Toilet Brush】Made of soft TPR material, the bristles are more flexible and these flat ones better fit the lower curved area of the toilet. The cleaning brush will not damage the toilet or accumulate the dirt. The toilet brushes & holders never wear out and change their shapes, they can keep perfect cleanliness.

【Durable & Effective】The silicone toilet brush long handled is made of stainless steel, which is rust resistance. Flat handle is more handy and non-slip than traditional plastic ones, making it easier to hold and the lightweight handle makes cleaning more enjoyable!

【Say Goodbye to Tangled Hair】Different from conventional plastic wc brushes, COSICOSY wall mounted toilet brush is easy to clean, simply rinse it with water to remove the hair and dirt that stick to the brush. The stainless steel toilet brush keeps cleaner and is much more hygienic in this process.

【Wall Mounted & Put it on the Floor】 The installation of this flexible toilet brush is very simple. With a strong adhesive on the back of the base, you can hang it on the wall without drilling, saving space to a great extent or just put it on the floor. Time to clean the WC is no longer a tragedy

【Multiple Applications】COSICOSY toilet cleaner brush is perfect for domestic bathrooms and excellent for use in hotels, hospitals, nursing homes, day care centers, residences, offices and schools, etc. It is also suitable for use in sinks, basins and bathtubs!
description: Product Description A good toilet brush must meet some key criteria as below. 1. The brush has to reach all the parts of the toilet bowl and scrub the bowl effectively. 2. The holder has to be stable, easy to clean, small enough to fit in a tight bathroom, and designed to allow the brush head to dry. 3. The brush handle must be long enough to keep your hands clean but short enough to let you work around the bowl, and ideally be clad in a nice grippy material. COSICOSY toilet brush is just a smart choise for you! COSICOSY TOILET BRUSH AND HOLDER Are you looking for a simple and efficient toilet cleaner brush? Our flexible toilet brush is your ideal choice. It’s carefully crafted to clean tricky spots that others fail to reach. It's perfect for your bathroom and doesn't take up space.With our stainless steel toilet brush, you have your own bathroom cleaning master! Specification Colour : Silver Size of handle: 18.7'' Material: TPR + Stainless Steel Installation type: floor / wall Weight: 445g Package: 1 x toilet brush and base，2 x wall sticker 360° Soft Silicone Brush Head The toilet brush head is equipped with soft and dense silicone bristles. Hair will not become tangled and difficult to clean. Clean Deep The toilet brushes & holders silicone is durable. Go deep into pipes and grooves, flexibly penetrate into hard-to-reach places, and fully clean the corners and dead corners of the toilet. Effort Saving & Easy to Install The handle is easy to install. The 18.7'' long handle will not splash dirt on your hands. Washable Brush Head The Brush Head will be clean after water pour. It drys fast and prevents stains stuck. Using Instruction for Wall Mounted: 1. Tear off the paste's protective film 2. Paste on the wall and squeeze out the air. Wait for 24 hours. 3. Put the back of the holder on the paste bump. 4. Place the toilet brush on the holder.
